---
title: "outreach"
format: html
editor: visual
listing: 
  contents: blog_posts 
  type: grid 
  sort: "date desc" # can also sort on more than one field
  categories: true
---

## 

As a person of color in STEM, I am passionate about helping people from all backgrounds experience science and the natural world.

My outreach touches science, activism, and nature. And, if nothing else, I hope to use facts and feelings to help others appreciate the world around them a little more.
